senses.gloss: verbal noun of هَزَلَ (hazala, “to joke”) (form I)

examples.text: […] فَٱحْفَظْ مِنْهُ لِسَانَكَ فِي الْجِدِّ وَٱلْهَزْلِ ، وَلَا تُعَوِّدْ نَفْسَكَ الْكَذِبَ هَزْلًا […]
examples.english: […] then keep your tongue from it (lying) in seriousness or jokefulness, and do not accustom yourself to lying jokingly […]
